ideal_must_detect.matched_text: On 22 May, an operations officer at our Da Nang service desk, born 1992-04-07, using company handset IMEI 860000001234567 and device tag DP-DA-042, accessed the issuer disclosure module via VPN node 10.0.14.23 and processed a payroll-linked vendor payment using salary account at MienTrung Commercial Bank ending 5531; this is flagged to ensure minimization of quasi-identifiers per Decree 13
